items.title: Toronto Raptors guard Chucky Hepburn will sign his two-way qualifying offer and return to the team next season, league sources told @hoopshypeofficial.bsky.social. He averaged 12.4 points and shot 36.8% from 3-point range with 8.6 assists and 2.4 steals for game with the Raptors
items.author: Michael Scotto
items.body_excerpt: Toronto Raptors guard Chucky Hepburn will sign his two-way qualifying offer and return to the team next season, league sources told @hoopshypeofficial.bsky.social. He averaged 12.4 points and shot 36.8% from 3-point range with 8.6 assists and 2.4 steals for game with the Raptors 905 in the G League.

items.title: Warriors cap situation after re-signing Al Horford.
items.author: Yossi Gozlan
items.body_excerpt:
Warriors cap situation after re-signing Al Horford.

He receives a slight raise off his player option and his maximum amount with Non Bird rights.

$20 million below the first apron, but it's fluid depending on Draymond Green, Kristaps Porzingis, and De'Anthony Melton decisions.

items.title: Intrigued by LaMelo Ball to the Wolves. Minny increases its variance w/ Ball. Might need that in brutal West when they lack total talent of OKC + Spurs. He's high upside and had an undeniable positive impact for Hornets last year. Wolves in % of shots from 3: 15th in regular seas
items.author: Mike Vorkunov
items.body_excerpt: Intrigued by LaMelo Ball to the Wolves. Minny increases its variance w/ Ball. Might need that in brutal West when they lack total talent of OKC + Spurs. He's high upside and had an undeniable positive impact for Hornets last year. Wolves in % of shots from 3: 15th in regular season; last in playoffs

items.author: Scott Agness

IU's Lamar Wilkerson agreed to an Exhibit 10 deal with the Oklahoma City Thunder (where former player DJ White is in the front office btw).

And Tucker DeVries agreed to an E10 with the Boston Celtics.
